TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Rao Pite siuni == Rao Pite siwni (Sr.M.Christine Lauber,CSC,1936-) Switzerland a tamdaw, misawad mitilid i Fribourg kangkofo pitilidan no Switzerland, 1963 miheca maocor no Payleng wayfang dintokay a tayni i Taywan, itira i Tadamaanay ciwcika Sida'itay siwnihuy a patadoay. Rao Pite, Switzerland a tamdaw, masofoc i 1936 miheca, misawad mitilid i Fribourg kangkofo pitilidan no Switzerland, 28 ko mihecaan maocor no Payleng wayfang dintokay a tayni i Posong, itira i Suli Posong isingan pitokadan padamaay tayal, nanoya minanam to sowal no Holam, ikor no 3 miheca malinah tayra i Taytong Kuansan Tadamaanay ciwcika padipotan, ta tayra cingra i padipotay padamaay tayal i kasa niyaro' no yincumin, marakat ko Singko, Sangwu, Senyong a niyaro', ikor no 8 miheca malinah tayra i adamaanay ciwcika padipotan midipot to makedetay ko pona', malitosaay ko adada no tiring, caayay to kadademak adadaay tamdaw. to mihecahecaan pakayni i ciadaday to faloco' tamdaw, saan misawad to pidipot to tayal, nika, ci Rao Pite siuni oyaan to ko pipatado ningra to dademaken, mipadang to roma a tayal no siuni. Tala lotok tala riyar, caay pahanhan ko rakat. 'Ayaw no 30 miheca, awaay ho ko makoracay nanom i niyaro' no yincumin, miliso' to adadaay, romakat to limaay enemay widi , nai tokos tangasa cinanomay, o malitosaay 'orip ningra, itiniay i sawalian no Taywan ko pisacikacikayan a romakak. Itini i kasa la'ed no Posong ato Kalingko a lotokay, enaray to niyaro', o Tadamaanay ciwcika padipotan matiya o itiraay i Switzerland ko saniyaro' no Kuansan. Mapateli ko caayay ka nga'ay ko kadademak a malitosaay ko tireng, talafalalay madoka', masokedetay ko pono' adadaay. O nika tayraan miraod, manengneng ci Rao Pite siuni to pidipot ningra to adadaay tada o pacekilan nengnengen, o demak ningra awaay a manengneng ko o nano isingan pacakat to tireng ko nilayapay to kompay a tamdaw, oya itiraay i papotal no pidipotan nanay ko nidemakan a micikeroh to adadaay, rahodayen ko pidemak to pipatado. Masamaamaanay to ko adada no adadaay, mananam to ci Rao Pite siuni. Nai 28 ko mihacaan ningra, maocor a tayni i Taywan, o tayal ni Rao Pite siuni i niyaro' no yincumin i Posong to mata'elifay ko 30 miheca. Kaitira ningra i Kuansan pidipotan, o inakaay a saniyaro', nika, itira o caayay ho ko nga'ayay ko lalan a rakaten itiya, o Kuansan, o kaitiraan no katayalan ni Rao Pite siuni ko riraan, halo Sinko, Sangwu, Senyong a niyaro' no yincumin, o nano nirakatan to ningra. Kasacoecoed no Posong itiya, ira:ay ho manengneng to ko tireng ni Rao Pite siuni, tamdaw no niyaro' pasowal to "Ira to ci Rao Pite siuni, ira to ci Rao Pite siuni." saan, salipahak sa ko masafelengay tamdaw a mihamham cingraan. "Saheto o iloma'ananay ko pidipot a tayal itiya." saan ci Rao Pite siuni, onini ko nihaenan, ano tata'ak ko orad to fali, talalotok aca, mipadang to caayay ka sikol no syakay a adadaay. Pipatado ni Rao Pite siuni to i lotokay ira ko 14 mihecaan i, maocor haca no kafafaw tayra i pasawali Singko Tingsokiw pamamaay. Saheto o mifotingay pakoyocay ko 'orip no itiraay tamdaw, saheto o mafasalay ko tireng, awaay ko 'icel, 'aloman ko ciadadaay to no fala'; nika awaay ko matatodongay a ising itira, ci Rao Pite siuni mararid misacikacikay, misatikotiko to pidama to adadaay. 15 ko mihecaan ni Rao Pite siuni itira i Sanwu pisimawan a tayal, o midipotay to masokedetay ko pona' a kaemangay, o kapot ni Rao Pite siuni ci Rao peicen siuni. Malahakelong tatosa mililiw to adadaay loma', mingitangit to loma' mihayda patayra i pidipotan miyatyat to tatirengan. Caay ka hakowa ko kihi no kiwkay, caay ka edeng ko sapi'aca to saka dademak to sapiyatyat a kikay, no kamayan sa ko pidemak, nanoyaan sa ira ko fana' a mipatado to adadaay. Itira i Sanwo a romi'ad, talacowa ira ko patihi no salikaka, nika awaay ko kanga'ayan, toya mihecaan ni Rao peicen siuni a miliso' to adadaay, matolo' cingra masetol no tosiya, mapatayra i ising no Switzerland, o tosaay tamdaw a tayal i teked han to ni Rao Pite siuni; tangasa i pipatikoan tayra i Kuansan midipot to malitosaay ko tireng a adadaay. "Kaemang ho, misetek to saka lasiunian ko tireng, pasowal ko ina ako, saka lasiunian ko niyah i, kao nga'ayay ko kala tamdaw." saan, oninian ko nisafaloco'an ni Rao Pite siuni "icowa ko mangalayay tokowan, itira kako." Sanay a nisafacoan, matiniay, nao mateli'ay ko fokes ato tatirengan itiya, tangasa kaawaayan to no 'icel, nika kapaseka'an i, o mama hacecay to malowan ko Padaka a siuni, oya tadancaay adadaay no yincumin, o cima sato ko mamidotoc tonini a tayal? Rao Pite siuni (Sr.M.Christine Lauber,CSC) pakalayap to saka 7 lekad to isingan pacakat a kompay a sapakaolah.饒培德修女(Sr.M.Christine Lauber,CSC) 獲第7屆醫療奉獻獎
S.PHON: == rao~u pitə sio~u~uni == rao~u pitə siwni (sr.m.ʦħristinə ɾao~u~ub~b~vər,ʦsʦ,****-) swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i frib~b~vo~uo~u~ur* kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, **** miħəʦa mao~uʦo~ur no~u pajɾəŋ wajfaŋ ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj a tajni i tajwan, itira i taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika siɬ~ɮaʡitaj siwniħo~u~uj a pataɬ~ɮo~uaj. rao~u pitə, swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, maso~ufo~uʦ i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i frib~b~vo~uo~u~ur* kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, ** ko~u miħəʦaan mao~uʦo~ur no~u pajɾəŋ wajfaŋ ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj a tajni i po~uso~uŋ, itira i so~u~uɾi po~uso~uŋ isiŋan pito~ukaɬ~ɮan paɬ~ɮamaaj tajaɾ, nano~uja minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam, iko~ur no~u * miħəʦa maɾinaħ tajra i tajto~uŋ ko~u~uansan taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika paɬ~ɮipo~utan, ta tajra ʦiŋra i paɬ~ɮipo~utaj paɬ~ɮamaaj tajaɾ i kasa nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, marakat ko~u siŋko~u, saŋwo~u~u, sənjo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, iko~ur no~u * miħəʦa maɾinaħ tajra i aɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika paɬ~ɮipo~utan miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u makəɬ~ɮətaj ko~u po~unaʡ, maɾito~usaaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u tiriŋ, ʦaajaj to~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw. to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan pakajni i ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ tamɬ~ɮaw, saan misawaɬ~ɮ to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u tajaɾ, nika, ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni o~ujaan to~u ko~u pipataɬ~ɮo~u niŋra to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ro~uma a tajaɾ no~u sio~u~uni. taɾa ɾo~uto~uk taɾa rijar, ʦaaj paħanħan ko~u rakat. ʡajaw no~u ** miħəʦa, awaaj ħo~u ko~u mako~uraʦaj nano~um i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾiso~uʡ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ro~umakat to~u ɾimaaj ənəmaj wiɬ~ɮi , nai to~uko~us taŋasa ʦinano~umaj, o~u maɾito~usaaj ʡo~urip niŋra, itiniaj i sawaɾian no~u tajwan ko~u pisaʦikaʦikajan a ro~umakak. itini i kasa ɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u po~uso~uŋ ato~u kaɾiŋko~u a ɾo~uto~ukaj, ənaraj to~u nijaro~uʡ, o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika paɬ~ɮipo~utan matija o~u itiraaj i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u sanijaro~uʡ no~u ko~u~uansan. mapatəɾi ko~u ʦaajaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a maɾito~usaaj ko~u tirəŋ, taɾafaɾaɾaj maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ, maso~ukəɬ~ɮətaj ko~u po~uno~uʡ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. o~u nika tajraan mirao~uɬ~ɮ, manəŋnəŋ ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut niŋra to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj taɬ~ɮa o~u paʦəkiɾan nəŋnəŋən, o~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra awaaj a manəŋnəŋ ko~u o~u nano~u isiŋan paʦakat to~u tirəŋ ko~u niɾajapaj to~u ko~umpaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja itiraaj i papo~utaɾ no~u piɬ~ɮipo~utan nanaj ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan a miʦikəro~uħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, raħo~uɬ~ɮajən ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u pipataɬ~ɮo~u. masamaamaanaj to~u ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, mananam to~u ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni. nai ** ko~u miħaʦaan niŋra, mao~uʦo~ur a tajni i tajwan, o~u tajaɾ ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin i po~uso~uŋ to~u mataʡəɾifaj ko~u ** miħəʦa. kaitira niŋra i ko~u~uansan piɬ~ɮipo~utan, o~u inakaaj a sanijaro~uʡ, nika, itira o~u ʦaajaj ħo~u ko~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u ɾaɾan a rakatən itija, o~u ko~u~uansan, o~u kaitiraan no~u katajaɾan ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni ko~u riraan, ħaɾo~u sinko~u, saŋwo~u~u, sənjo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u nano~u nirakatan to~u niŋra. kasaʦo~uəʦo~uəɬ~ɮ no~u po~uso~uŋ itija, ira:aj ħo~u manəŋnəŋ to~u ko~u tirəŋ ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni, tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ paso~uwaɾ to~u "ira to~u ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni, ira to~u ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni." saan, saɾipaħak sa ko~u masafəɾəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw a miħamħam ʦiŋraan. "saħəto~u o~u iɾo~umaʡananaj ko~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut a tajaɾ itija." saan ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni, o~unini ko~u niħaənan, ano~u tataʡak ko~u o~uraɬ~ɮ to~u faɾi, taɾaɾo~uto~uk aʦa, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ʦaajaj ka siko~uɾ no~u sjakaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. pipataɬ~ɮo~u ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni to~u i ɾo~uto~ukaj ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan i, mao~uʦo~ur ħaʦa no~u kafafaw tajra i pasawaɾi siŋko~u tiŋso~ukiw pamamaaj. saħəto~u o~u mifo~utiŋaj pako~ujo~uʦaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u itiraaj tamɬ~ɮaw, saħəto~u o~u mafasaɾaj ko~u tirəŋ, awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u no~u faɾaʡ; nika awaaj ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a isiŋ itira, ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni marariɬ~ɮ misaʦikaʦikaj, misatiko~utiko~u to~u piɬ~ɮama to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni itira i sanwo~u~u pisimawan a tajaɾ, o~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u maso~ukəɬ~ɮətaj ko~u po~unaʡ a kaəmaŋaj, o~u kapo~ut ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni ʦi rao~u pəiʦən sio~u~uni. maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ tato~usa miɾiɾiw to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ɾo~umaʡ, miŋitaŋit to~u ɾo~umaʡ miħajɬ~ɮa patajra i piɬ~ɮipo~utan mijatjat to~u tatirəŋan. ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u kiħi no~u kiwkaj, ʦaaj ka əɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u sapiʡaʦa to~u saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u sapijatjat a kikaj, no~u kamajan sa ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak, nano~ujaan sa ira ko~u fanaʡ a mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. itira i sanwo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u patiħi no~u saɾikaka, nika awaaj ko~u kaŋaʡajan, to~uja miħəʦaan ni rao~u pəiʦən sio~u~uni a miɾiso~uʡ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, mato~uɾo~uʡ ʦiŋra masəto~uɾ no~u to~usija, mapatajra i isiŋ no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u to~usaaj tamɬ~ɮaw a tajaɾ i təkəɬ~ɮ ħan to~u ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni; taŋasa i pipatiko~uan tajra i ko~u~uansan miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u maɾito~usaaj ko~u tirəŋ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. "kaəmaŋ ħo~u, misətək to~u saka ɾasio~u~unian ko~u tirəŋ, paso~uwaɾ ko~u ina ako~u, saka ɾasio~u~unian ko~u nijaħ i, kao~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u kaɾa tamɬ~ɮaw." saan, o~uninian ko~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni "iʦo~uwa ko~u maŋaɾajaj to~uko~uwan, itira kako~u." sanaj a nisafaʦo~uan, matiniaj, nao~u matəɾiʡaj ko~u fo~ukəs ato~u tatirəŋan itija, taŋasa kaawaajan to~u no~u ʡiʦəɾ, nika kapasəkaʡan i, o~u mama ħaʦəʦaj to~u maɾo~uwan ko~u paɬ~ɮaka a sio~u~uni, o~uja taɬ~ɮanʦaaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u ʦima sato~u ko~u mamiɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~unini a tajaɾ? rao~u pitə sio~u~uni (sr.m.ʦħristinə ɾao~u~ub~b~vər,ʦsʦ) pakaɾajap to~u saka * ɾəkaɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋan paʦakat a ko~umpaj a sapakao~uɾaħ.*****(sr.m.ʦħristinə ɾao~u~ub~b~vər,ʦsʦ) *********
S.FORM: == Rao Pite siuni == Rao Pite siwni (Sr.M.Christine Lauber,CSC,1936-) Switzerland a tamdaw, misawad mitilid i Fribourg kangkofo pitilidan no Switzerland, 1963 miheca maocor no Payleng wayfang dintokay a tayni i Taywan, itira i Tadamaanay ciwcika Sida'itay siwnihuy a patadoay. Rao Pite, Switzerland a tamdaw, masofoc i 1936 miheca, misawad mitilid i Fribourg kangkofo pitilidan no Switzerland, 28 ko mihecaan maocor no Payleng wayfang dintokay a tayni i Posong, itira i Suli Posong isingan pitokadan padamaay tayal, nanoya minanam to sowal no Holam, ikor no 3 miheca malinah tayra i Taytong Kuansan Tadamaanay ciwcika padipotan, ta tayra cingra i padipotay padamaay tayal i kasa niyaro' no yincumin, marakat ko Singko, Sangwu, Senyong a niyaro', ikor no 8 miheca malinah tayra i adamaanay ciwcika padipotan midipot to makedetay ko pona', malitosaay ko adada no tiring, caayay to kadademak adadaay tamdaw. to mihecahecaan pakayni i ciadaday to faloco' tamdaw, saan misawad to pidipot to tayal, nika, ci Rao Pite siuni oyaan to ko pipatado ningra to dademaken, mipadang to roma a tayal no siuni. Tala lotok tala riyar, caay pahanhan ko rakat. 'Ayaw no 30 miheca, awaay ho ko makoracay nanom i niyaro' no yincumin, miliso' to adadaay, romakat to limaay enemay widi , nai tokos tangasa cinanomay, o malitosaay 'orip ningra, itiniay i sawalian no Taywan ko pisacikacikayan a romakak. Itini i kasa la'ed no Posong ato Kalingko a lotokay, enaray to niyaro', o Tadamaanay ciwcika padipotan matiya o itiraay i Switzerland ko saniyaro' no Kuansan. Mapateli ko caayay ka nga'ay ko kadademak a malitosaay ko tireng, talafalalay madoka', masokedetay ko pono' adadaay. O nika tayraan miraod, manengneng ci Rao Pite siuni to pidipot ningra to adadaay tada o pacekilan nengnengen, o demak ningra awaay a manengneng ko o nano isingan pacakat to tireng ko nilayapay to kompay a tamdaw, oya itiraay i papotal no pidipotan nanay ko nidemakan a micikeroh to adadaay, rahodayen ko pidemak to pipatado. Masamaamaanay to ko adada no adadaay, mananam to ci Rao Pite siuni. Nai 28 ko mihacaan ningra, maocor a tayni i Taywan, o tayal ni Rao Pite siuni i niyaro' no yincumin i Posong to mata'elifay ko 30 miheca. Kaitira ningra i Kuansan pidipotan, o inakaay a saniyaro', nika, itira o caayay ho ko nga'ayay ko lalan a rakaten itiya, o Kuansan, o kaitiraan no katayalan ni Rao Pite siuni ko riraan, halo Sinko, Sangwu, Senyong a niyaro' no yincumin, o nano nirakatan to ningra. Kasacoecoed no Posong itiya, ira:ay ho manengneng to ko tireng ni Rao Pite siuni, tamdaw no niyaro' pasowal to "Ira to ci Rao Pite siuni, ira to ci Rao Pite siuni." saan, salipahak sa ko masafelengay tamdaw a mihamham cingraan. "Saheto o iloma'ananay ko pidipot a tayal itiya." saan ci Rao Pite siuni, onini ko nihaenan, ano tata'ak ko orad to fali, talalotok aca, mipadang to caayay ka sikol no syakay a adadaay. Pipatado ni Rao Pite siuni to i lotokay ira ko 14 mihecaan i, maocor haca no kafafaw tayra i pasawali Singko Tingsokiw pamamaay. Saheto o mifotingay pakoyocay ko 'orip no itiraay tamdaw, saheto o mafasalay ko tireng, awaay ko 'icel, 'aloman ko ciadadaay to no fala'; nika awaay ko matatodongay a ising itira, ci Rao Pite siuni mararid misacikacikay, misatikotiko to pidama to adadaay. 15 ko mihecaan ni Rao Pite siuni itira i Sanwu pisimawan a tayal, o midipotay to masokedetay ko pona' a kaemangay, o kapot ni Rao Pite siuni ci Rao peicen siuni. Malahakelong tatosa mililiw to adadaay loma', mingitangit to loma' mihayda patayra i pidipotan miyatyat to tatirengan. Caay ka hakowa ko kihi no kiwkay, caay ka edeng ko sapi'aca to saka dademak to sapiyatyat a kikay, no kamayan sa ko pidemak, nanoyaan sa ira ko fana' a mipatado to adadaay. Itira i Sanwo a romi'ad, talacowa ira ko patihi no salikaka, nika awaay ko kanga'ayan, toya mihecaan ni Rao peicen siuni a miliso' to adadaay, matolo' cingra masetol no tosiya, mapatayra i ising no Switzerland, o tosaay tamdaw a tayal i teked han to ni Rao Pite siuni; tangasa i pipatikoan tayra i Kuansan midipot to malitosaay ko tireng a adadaay. "Kaemang ho, misetek to saka lasiunian ko tireng, pasowal ko ina ako, saka lasiunian ko niyah i, kao nga'ayay ko kala tamdaw." saan, oninian ko nisafaloco'an ni Rao Pite siuni "icowa ko mangalayay tokowan, itira kako." Sanay a nisafacoan, matiniay, nao mateli'ay ko fokes ato tatirengan itiya, tangasa kaawaayan to no 'icel, nika kapaseka'an i, o mama hacecay to malowan ko Padaka a siuni, oya tadancaay adadaay no yincumin, o cima sato ko mamidotoc tonini a tayal? Rao Pite siuni (Sr.M.Christine Lauber,CSC) pakalayap to saka 7 lekad to isingan pacakat a kompay a sapakaolah.饒培德修女(Sr.M.Christine Lauber,CSC) 獲第7屆醫療奉獻獎
S.PHON: == rao~u pitə sio~u~uni == rao~u pitə siwni (sr.m.ʦħristinə ɾao~u~ub~b~vər,ʦsʦ,****-) swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i frib~b~vo~uo~u~ur* kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, **** miħəʦa mao~uʦo~ur no~u pajɾəŋ wajfaŋ ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj a tajni i tajwan, itira i taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika siɬ~ɮaʡitaj siwniħo~u~uj a pataɬ~ɮo~uaj. rao~u pitə, swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, maso~ufo~uʦ i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i frib~b~vo~uo~u~ur* kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, ** ko~u miħəʦaan mao~uʦo~ur no~u pajɾəŋ wajfaŋ ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj a tajni i po~uso~uŋ, itira i so~u~uɾi po~uso~uŋ isiŋan pito~ukaɬ~ɮan paɬ~ɮamaaj tajaɾ, nano~uja minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam, iko~ur no~u * miħəʦa maɾinaħ tajra i tajto~uŋ ko~u~uansan taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika paɬ~ɮipo~utan, ta tajra ʦiŋra i paɬ~ɮipo~utaj paɬ~ɮamaaj tajaɾ i kasa nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, marakat ko~u siŋko~u, saŋwo~u~u, sənjo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, iko~ur no~u * miħəʦa maɾinaħ tajra i aɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika paɬ~ɮipo~utan miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u makəɬ~ɮətaj ko~u po~unaʡ, maɾito~usaaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u tiriŋ, ʦaajaj to~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw. to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan pakajni i ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ tamɬ~ɮaw, saan misawaɬ~ɮ to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u tajaɾ, nika, ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni o~ujaan to~u ko~u pipataɬ~ɮo~u niŋra to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ro~uma a tajaɾ no~u sio~u~uni. taɾa ɾo~uto~uk taɾa rijar, ʦaaj paħanħan ko~u rakat. ʡajaw no~u ** miħəʦa, awaaj ħo~u ko~u mako~uraʦaj nano~um i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾiso~uʡ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ro~umakat to~u ɾimaaj ənəmaj wiɬ~ɮi , nai to~uko~us taŋasa ʦinano~umaj, o~u maɾito~usaaj ʡo~urip niŋra, itiniaj i sawaɾian no~u tajwan ko~u pisaʦikaʦikajan a ro~umakak. itini i kasa ɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u po~uso~uŋ ato~u kaɾiŋko~u a ɾo~uto~ukaj, ənaraj to~u nijaro~uʡ, o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦiwʦika paɬ~ɮipo~utan matija o~u itiraaj i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u sanijaro~uʡ no~u ko~u~uansan. mapatəɾi ko~u ʦaajaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a maɾito~usaaj ko~u tirəŋ, taɾafaɾaɾaj maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ, maso~ukəɬ~ɮətaj ko~u po~uno~uʡ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. o~u nika tajraan mirao~uɬ~ɮ, manəŋnəŋ ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut niŋra to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj taɬ~ɮa o~u paʦəkiɾan nəŋnəŋən, o~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra awaaj a manəŋnəŋ ko~u o~u nano~u isiŋan paʦakat to~u tirəŋ ko~u niɾajapaj to~u ko~umpaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja itiraaj i papo~utaɾ no~u piɬ~ɮipo~utan nanaj ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan a miʦikəro~uħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, raħo~uɬ~ɮajən ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u pipataɬ~ɮo~u. masamaamaanaj to~u ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, mananam to~u ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni. nai ** ko~u miħaʦaan niŋra, mao~uʦo~ur a tajni i tajwan, o~u tajaɾ ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin i po~uso~uŋ to~u mataʡəɾifaj ko~u ** miħəʦa. kaitira niŋra i ko~u~uansan piɬ~ɮipo~utan, o~u inakaaj a sanijaro~uʡ, nika, itira o~u ʦaajaj ħo~u ko~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u ɾaɾan a rakatən itija, o~u ko~u~uansan, o~u kaitiraan no~u katajaɾan ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni ko~u riraan, ħaɾo~u sinko~u, saŋwo~u~u, sənjo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u nano~u nirakatan to~u niŋra. kasaʦo~uəʦo~uəɬ~ɮ no~u po~uso~uŋ itija, ira:aj ħo~u manəŋnəŋ to~u ko~u tirəŋ ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni, tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ paso~uwaɾ to~u "ira to~u ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni, ira to~u ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni." saan, saɾipaħak sa ko~u masafəɾəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw a miħamħam ʦiŋraan. "saħəto~u o~u iɾo~umaʡananaj ko~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut a tajaɾ itija." saan ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni, o~unini ko~u niħaənan, ano~u tataʡak ko~u o~uraɬ~ɮ to~u faɾi, taɾaɾo~uto~uk aʦa, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ʦaajaj ka siko~uɾ no~u sjakaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. pipataɬ~ɮo~u ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni to~u i ɾo~uto~ukaj ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan i, mao~uʦo~ur ħaʦa no~u kafafaw tajra i pasawaɾi siŋko~u tiŋso~ukiw pamamaaj. saħəto~u o~u mifo~utiŋaj pako~ujo~uʦaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u itiraaj tamɬ~ɮaw, saħəto~u o~u mafasaɾaj ko~u tirəŋ, awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u no~u faɾaʡ; nika awaaj ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a isiŋ itira, ʦi rao~u pitə sio~u~uni marariɬ~ɮ misaʦikaʦikaj, misatiko~utiko~u to~u piɬ~ɮama to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni itira i sanwo~u~u pisimawan a tajaɾ, o~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u maso~ukəɬ~ɮətaj ko~u po~unaʡ a kaəmaŋaj, o~u kapo~ut ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni ʦi rao~u pəiʦən sio~u~uni. maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ tato~usa miɾiɾiw to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ɾo~umaʡ, miŋitaŋit to~u ɾo~umaʡ miħajɬ~ɮa patajra i piɬ~ɮipo~utan mijatjat to~u tatirəŋan. ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u kiħi no~u kiwkaj, ʦaaj ka əɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u sapiʡaʦa to~u saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u sapijatjat a kikaj, no~u kamajan sa ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak, nano~ujaan sa ira ko~u fanaʡ a mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. itira i sanwo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u patiħi no~u saɾikaka, nika awaaj ko~u kaŋaʡajan, to~uja miħəʦaan ni rao~u pəiʦən sio~u~uni a miɾiso~uʡ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, mato~uɾo~uʡ ʦiŋra masəto~uɾ no~u to~usija, mapatajra i isiŋ no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u to~usaaj tamɬ~ɮaw a tajaɾ i təkəɬ~ɮ ħan to~u ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni; taŋasa i pipatiko~uan tajra i ko~u~uansan miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u maɾito~usaaj ko~u tirəŋ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. "kaəmaŋ ħo~u, misətək to~u saka ɾasio~u~unian ko~u tirəŋ, paso~uwaɾ ko~u ina ako~u, saka ɾasio~u~unian ko~u nijaħ i, kao~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u kaɾa tamɬ~ɮaw." saan, o~uninian ko~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ni rao~u pitə sio~u~uni "iʦo~uwa ko~u maŋaɾajaj to~uko~uwan, itira kako~u." sanaj a nisafaʦo~uan, matiniaj, nao~u matəɾiʡaj ko~u fo~ukəs ato~u tatirəŋan itija, taŋasa kaawaajan to~u no~u ʡiʦəɾ, nika kapasəkaʡan i, o~u mama ħaʦəʦaj to~u maɾo~uwan ko~u paɬ~ɮaka a sio~u~uni, o~uja taɬ~ɮanʦaaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u ʦima sato~u ko~u mamiɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~unini a tajaɾ? rao~u pitə sio~u~uni (sr.m.ʦħristinə ɾao~u~ub~b~vər,ʦsʦ) pakaɾajap to~u saka * ɾəkaɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋan paʦakat a ko~umpaj a sapakao~uɾaħ.*****(sr.m.ʦħristinə ɾao~u~ub~b~vər,ʦsʦ) *********
